title: Kenyatta: Do Not Wait Your Turn
original_title: Kenyatta: Do Not Wait Your Turn
overview: An inspiring love story about a self-described “poor, gay, black man from North Philly” on his historic run for the United States Senate. But this race is about more than taking on the political competition. It’s about taking on an entire system.
